utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. All details required under each item are present and well specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes a destination (Prague, Czech Republic), a round-trip flight from Paris to Prague costing €360, a family hotel in central Prague for €750, and activities described as a family-friendly city tour, Prague Castle visit, river cruise, and kids’ science museum. Based on the ground-truth ratings: (1) The destination 'Prague, Czech Republic' has a rating of 7. (2) The flight cost (€360) suggests a standard airline business class ticket, which has a rating of 10. (3) The 'Family hotel in central Prague' matches best with 'Family Haven Hotel' (family-oriented and mid-luxury), which has a rating of 9. (4) The 'Family-friendly city tour' aligns with 'City Walking Tour' (rating 9). (5) 'Prague Castle visit' is a cultural sightseeing equivalent, best captured by 'Museum Day Pass' (rating 10) given similar low-stress cultural value. (6) 'River cruise' is not explicitly listed, but the closest in activity type (low intensity, scenic, family-friendly) is 'Sailing Course' (rating 8). (7) 'Kids’ science museum' directly matches 'Science Museum for kids' (rating 10).
